clusterWarnings: Fragment-pivot negation recurs across narration from the ride through the gate answer.

findings.line: Sylvanas was not needling her. She was shaving the thought down to what could be used.
findings.deletionTest: She was shaving the thought down to what could be used.
findings.reason: Pattern 5 preamble negation; the second sentence carries the meaning without the negated setup.
findings.suggestedFix: Sylvanas was shaving the thought down to what could be used.

findings.reason: Pattern 2 fragment pivot; the negated lead-in is scaffolding once the sentence lands on the real condition.

findings.line: No title. No courtesy. Only that.
findings.reason: Chained refusals build a hallway to the real point instead of stating it directly.

clusterFlags: Mid-to-late chapter repeatedly hands action verbs to abstractions, scenery, and geography.

findings.line: The answer rose sharp and died before it left her mouth.
findings.subject: answer
findings.realAgent: Jaina had a sharp reply ready and stopped herself from saying it.
findings.reason: Pattern 5 object-agency smear caught by the pass-A extra sweep; the answer is not the agent.
findings.suggestedFix: She had a sharp answer ready and bit it back before it left her mouth.

findings.line: Stratholme's outer farms wore the city's appetite openly: long barns, mill sheds, kitchen plots ragged from harvest traffic, smoke from ovens too small to be anything but household work.
findings.subject: Stratholme's outer farms
findings.realAgent: The visible barns, sheds, traffic-worn plots, and oven smoke show how heavily the city feeds itself.
findings.reason: Pass-A extra sweep: scenery carries a display verb instead of the narration naming the visible evidence.
findings.suggestedFix: Long barns, mill sheds, kitchen plots ragged from harvest traffic, and smoke from ovens too small to be anything but household work made the city's appetite plain.

findings.subject: lane
findings.realAgent: Workers, carts, civilians, and the newly moving dead all break into motion at once.
findings.reason: Pass-A extra sweep: infrastructure takes a violent action verb that belongs to the people in it.
findings.suggestedFix: Workers shouted, carts jolted, and people broke in every direction.

findings.line: All around them, proof kept piling up: warm rolls under cloth, half a loaf on an old man's knee, bread cooling on a board behind an open kitchen door.
findings.subject: proof
findings.realAgent: The visible bread and household scenes keep accumulating around them.
findings.reason: Pattern 5 abstraction-as-agent; the scene already has concrete evidence that can do this work directly.
findings.suggestedFix: All around them, warm rolls sat under cloth, half a loaf rested on an old man's knee, and bread cooled on a board behind an open kitchen door.

findings.line: The count kept multiplying faster than her mind could hold it.
findings.subject: count
findings.realAgent: More loaves, baskets, and carriers keep entering Jaina's view.
findings.reason: Pattern 5/9 abstraction acting; the scene already has concrete carriers that can do the work.
findings.suggestedFix: More loaves, baskets, and hands kept entering her view faster than she could hold them in her head.

findings.line: The city sat at her back like weight she could not shrug off.
findings.subject: city
findings.realAgent: The city's immediate physical presence and everything Jaina has just seen keep pressing on her attention.
findings.reason: Pass-A extra sweep: geography takes a bodily pose instead of the narration naming the pressure directly.
findings.suggestedFix: At her back, the city was impossible to ignore.

findings.line: Silence spread through the officers around them.
findings.subject: Silence
findings.realAgent: The officers stop talking after Jaina's answer.
findings.reason: Pattern 7 absence given active motion; the officers are the agents in the scene.
findings.suggestedFix: The officers around them fell silent.

audits.cleanReason: Counted the capped tic families in this chapter and none exceeded threshold: corner-of-mouth 1/1, marked 1/2, tightened 1/3, and performance dialogue tags 1/3.

summary.verdictReason: Fail: intent-smear audit produced 7 MODERATE kills, so pass A cannot pass even though recurring prose tics stayed under cap.
